---
title: Hiver
author: Raphaële Slimane
image: https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061314/hivervetements_osi2uv.png
description: Vêtements d'hiver
categories: ["miscellaneous"]
date: 2026-01-12
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
---

![](https://res.cloudinary.com/dyjfju0u4/image/upload/f_auto,q_auto/v1780061314/hivervetements_osi2uv.png)


::: {.visually-hidden}
{{< meta description >}}
:::
